name: Deutsches Beefsteak (German Beefsteaks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the hard roll in water.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a frying pan and cook the chopped onions until lightly browned. Transfer the onions to a bowl.
3. Squeeze out as much excess moisture from the roll as possible and mix it with the cooked onions.
4. Add the ground beef to the mixture; blend well. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Shape the meat into 4 patties. Cook for about 5 minutes on each side, or until they reach the desired doneness. Remove and keep warm.
6. Add the sliced onions to the pan drippings and cook until lightly browned.
7. Arrange the beefsteaks on a serving platter and top with onion rings.
